title: Caller identity (GET /me)
description: The caller's own resolved identity: the server-stamped principal (../principal.schema.json — kind, id, tiers, lanes, scopes, zookie; NEVER trusted from the client) extended with display fields for the session chip. Returned as a single object, not a read-envelope page. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.
$comment: principal.schema.json is additionalProperties: true (fixed board round 1), so this allOf composition validates cleanly.

display_name.description: Human-facing name for the session chip; null when none is configured.

grant_name.description: The session chip's scope name — the human-readable name of the grant snapshot this principal was resolved under; null when unnamed.
